MapSection.understandDrought: Understand the drought in your region

droughtData.acontecendo: Currently, {semSeca}% of {nome}'s territory is without drought, with stable humidity levels. However, {alerta}% of the region is in Alert state (Severe Drought), requiring constant attention to water reserves.

impacto.stable: Stable areas ({semSeca}%): Favorable conditions for agricultural development.
impacto.alert: Alert State: Risk of crop failure in {alerta}% of the productive area.
impacto.improvement: Signs of improvement: {recuperacao}% of the territory shows signs of water recovery.
